tools.name: analyze_component
tools.description: Statically analyze a Vue SFC to extract its props and emits. Accepts a Vue component path directly, or an art-file reference that resolves to the linked component source.

path.description: Path to the .vue component file or .art.vue file (relative to project root)

title.description: Resolve an art file by its display title, then analyze its component source

component.description: Resolve an art file by its component reference or component basename, then analyze it

query.description: Fuzzy-search an art file, then analyze the linked component source

ref.description: Generic art-file reference: path, title, component name, or search text

tools.name: get_palette
tools.description: Derive an interactive props palette (control types, defaults, ranges, options) for a component described by an Art file. Falls back to SFC analysis when native palette inference is sparse.

path.description: Path to the .art.vue file (relative to project root)

title.description: Resolve an art file by title instead of path

component.description: Resolve an art file by component reference or component basename

query.description: Fuzzy-search an art file before generating the palette

ref.description: Generic art-file reference: path, title, component name, or search text

tools.name: list_components
tools.description: List components registered in the design system. Returns titles, categories, tags, status, variant names, and related resource URIs.

component.description: Filter by component reference or component basename

limit.description: Maximum number of components to return (default: all)

includeVariants.description: Include per-variant metadata in the result (default: false)

sortBy.description: Sort order for the result list (default: title)

tools.name: get_component
tools.description: Get full details of a design-system component: metadata, variants, source-component analysis, palette data, documentation, and related resource URIs.

path.description: Path to the .art.vue file (relative to project root)

title.description: Resolve an art file by display title instead of path

component.description: Resolve an art file by component reference or component basename

query.description: Fuzzy-search an art file before loading details

ref.description: Generic art-file reference: path, title, component name, or search text

includeAnalysis.description: Include resolved component props/emits analysis (default: true)

includeDocumentation.description: Include generated Markdown docs inline (default: false)

tools.name: get_variant
tools.description: Retrieve a single variant (template and metadata) from a component, resolving the component by path, title, component name, or fuzzy query.

title.description: Resolve an art file by title

component.description: Resolve an art file by component reference or component basename

query.description: Fuzzy-search an art file before looking up the variant

ref.description: Generic art-file reference: path, title, component name, or search text

includeAnalysis.description: Include resolved component props/emits analysis (default: false)

tools.name: search_components
tools.description: Ranked full-text search over component titles, descriptions, categories, tags, component names, and variant names.

component.description: Restrict matches to a component reference/basename before searching

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)

tools.name: recommend_components
tools.description: Intent-oriented component recommendation. Useful when the user describes a task or UX goal rather than knowing exact component names.

task.description: Intent or UI task to solve

limit.description: Maximum number of recommendations to return (default: 5)

tools.name: generate_variants
tools.description: Analyze a Vue component's props and auto-generate an .art.vue file containing appropriate variant combinations (default, boolean toggles, enum values, etc.).

componentPath.description: Path to the .vue component file (relative to project root)

maxVariants.description: Maximum number of variants to generate (default: 20)

includeBooleanToggles.description: Generate variants that toggle each boolean prop (default: true)

includeEnumVariants.description: Generate one variant per enum/union value (default: true)

tools.name: generate_csf
tools.description: Convert an .art.vue file into Storybook CSF 3.0 code for integration with existing Storybook setups.

title.description: Resolve an art file by title

component.description: Resolve an art file by component reference or component basename

query.description: Fuzzy-search an art file before converting to CSF

ref.description: Generic art-file reference: path, title, component name, or search text

tools.name: generate_docs
tools.description: Generate Markdown documentation for a design-system component from its .art.vue definition.

path.description: Path to the .art.vue file (relative to project root)

title.description: Resolve an art file by title

component.description: Resolve an art file by component reference or component basename

query.description: Fuzzy-search an art file before generating docs

ref.description: Generic art-file reference: path, title, component name, or search text

includeSource.description: Embed source code in the output (default: false)

includeTemplates.description: Embed variant templates in the output (default: false)

tools.name: generate_catalog
tools.description: Produce a single Markdown catalog covering every component in the design system, grouped by category.

includeSource.description: Embed source code in the catalog (default: false)

includeTemplates.description: Embed variant templates in the catalog (default: false)

tools.name: get_tokens
tools.description: Read design tokens (colors, spacing, typography, etc.) from a Style Dictionary-compatible JSON file or directory. Auto-detects common paths if not specified.

tokensPath.description: Path to tokens JSON file or directory (relative to project root). Auto-detects tokens/, design-tokens/, or style-dictionary/ if omitted.

tools.name: search_tokens
tools.description: Search flattened design tokens by token name, category path, value, or description. Much more practical than loading the full token tree for large systems.

tokensPath.description: Path to tokens JSON file or directory (relative to project root). Auto-detects common locations if omitted.

type.description: Optional token type filter, e.g. color, dimension, typography

limit.description: Maximum number of matches to return (default: 20)

resources.name: Component Index
resources.description: JSON summary of the project component registry

resources.name: Component Catalog
resources.description: Markdown catalog for the whole design system

findings.title: 'generate_catalog' defines no required fields
findings.description: All parameters are implicitly optional. Verify this is intentional.
findings.remediation: Declare required parameters explicitly to enforce correct usage.

findings.title: Injection reflected — 'recommend_components.task'
findings.description: Payload was echoed back as a named JSON field — likely input logging, not a vulnerability (field: generic_string).
findings.remediation: Sanitize and validate all input parameters. Never pass raw user input to shell commands, file paths, or SQL queries.

findings.title: 'list_components' accepts undeclared extra fields
findings.description: Tool accepted arguments containing '__proto__' without error.
findings.remediation: Reject calls containing parameters not declared in inputSchema.

findings.title: 'search_components.query' silently accepts wrong type
findings.description: Expected type 'string', sent int value '12345' — no error returned.
findings.remediation: Validate parameter types strictly and return clear JSON-RPC errors on mismatch.

findings.title: 'search_components' accepts undeclared extra fields
findings.description: Tool accepted arguments containing '__proto__' without error.
findings.remediation: Reject calls containing parameters not declared in inputSchema.

findings.title: 'recommend_components.task' silently accepts wrong type
findings.description: Expected type 'string', sent int value '12345' — no error returned.
findings.remediation: Validate parameter types strictly and return clear JSON-RPC errors on mismatch.

findings.title: 'recommend_components' accepts undeclared extra fields
findings.description: Tool accepted arguments containing '__proto__' without error.
findings.remediation: Reject calls containing parameters not declared in inputSchema.

findings.title: 'generate_catalog' accepts undeclared extra fields
findings.description: Tool accepted arguments containing '__proto__' without error.
findings.remediation: Reject calls containing parameters not declared in inputSchema.

findings.title: initialize accepts protocol version downgrade
findings.description: The server accepted initialize with arbitrary protocol versions: ['9999-99-99', '2030-01-01', '1.0', '2024-01-01', '""', '0.1']. The server also accepted far-future versions, indicating no version validation at all. Servers should reject versions outside their supported range to prevent feature-downgrade attacks.
findings.remediation: Validate protocolVersion against a supported range. Return a JSON-RPC error for versions outside that range.

findings.title: Null request ID accepted — JSON-RPC spec violation
findings.description: The server accepted a request with id=null and returned a result. Per JSON-RPC 2.0, null IDs are reserved for notifications (no response expected). Accepting them may cause response routing bugs in complex orchestration scenarios.
findings.remediation: Reject requests with null id values; treat them as notifications.

findings.title: Protocol crash — string params caused server disconnect
findings.description: Sending a tools/call request where params is a string (not an object) caused the server to crash or disconnect. The JSON-RPC spec requires params to be an array or object.
findings.remediation: Validate params type (must be object or array) before processing. Return -32600 (Invalid Request) for wrong types.
